violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Store single service items away from unprotected drain lines under FOH hand sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Unfinished wall at walk in units.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
